data.body: PLAN & KICKOFF. Executing epic bf50 (graceless-hominine-jerboa): 19 story children, depth 1, no inter-sibling blocking edges. All are test-coverage-audit remediation. Landing method: rebar/Gerrit default — each code leaf = stacked relation-chain change to refs/for/main, closed after Verified+1, epic stack submitted last. Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-bf50 on branch epic/bf50-testcov-remediation from origin/main@2d1524ad8. Gates: plan-review claim gate ON, completion-verifier close gate ON. Stack ordering constrained by shared prod/test files: gitutil.py (df83->bdbe->8368), lock.py+test_lock_stale_reclaim.py (df7b,8f43,2202), applier.py (8111,003d), sync.py (b6c5). Processing sequentially in one relation chain, priority order p0->p3.
